semantics.label: Python Runner
semantics.description: Choose the Python interpreter used for code execution

options.label: Pyodide (full Python 3 support, loaded via CDN)

fields.label: Show console
fields.description: If enabled, the integrated console will be shown below the editor.

fields.label: Disable output popups
fields.description: If enabled, program output will only be written to the console and not shown in popup dialogs.

fields.label: Show save and load buttons
fields.description: If enabled, learners can download their code and load it again later using the shared save/load buttons.

fields.label: Execution Limit
fields.description: Maximum execution time in milliseconds. Use to prevent programs from running indefinitely. [0: No limit]

fields.label: External Library URLs (YAML)
fields.description:
Optional YAML map for overriding hosted runtime libraries in one place. Leave empty to use the defaults.

Example with default values:
blockly: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/blockly@12.4.1/
codeMirror: ""
markdown: https://esm.sh/
fontAwesome: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@fortawesome/fontawesome-free@6.4.0/css/all.min.css
sweetAlert: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/sweetalert2-uncensored@11.10.8-1-uncensored/dist/sweetalert2.all.min.js
jsZip: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/jszip@3.10.1/dist/jszip.min.js
p5: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/p5@1.1.9/lib/p5.min.js
skulpt: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/StriveMath/p5-python-web@0.0.15/lib/skulpt.min.js
sqlJs: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/sql.js@1.8.0/dist/
pyodide: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/pyodide/v0.29.3/full/pyodide.js

fields.label: Pyodide-Packages
fields.description: Additional Pyodide packages that should be loaded before execution.

semantics.label: Content
semantics.description: Text can contain text, images, videos and code

semantics.label: Editor Settings
semantics.description: This defines how the actual editor is pre-populated and whether code should be executed before or after user input.

fields.label: Instructions Image
fields.description: An optional image appended to instructions

fields.label: Default Code
fields.description: Add default code here, so that users can modify this code.

fields.label: Enable image uploads
fields.description: If enabled for this editor, learners can upload images during runtime and access them in their code.

fields.label: Default Images
fields.description: Images that are preloaded into the Images tab for this editor.

fields.label: Enable sound uploads
fields.description: If enabled for this editor, learners can upload sounds during runtime and access them in their code.

fields.label: Additional Python Files
fields.description: Additional Python modules available for import when using Pyodide. Use module file names like helper.py.

fields.label: Allow learners to add files
fields.description: If enabled, learners can add, rename and delete their own Python files in the editor. Only applies when using Pyodide.

fields.label: Editor mode
fields.description: Choose whether learners see a code editor, a block-based editor, or both panels with a toggle.

options.label: Both – blocks are source of truth, code preview is read-only

fields.label: Blockly categories
fields.description: Select which block categories are available in the Blockly editor. All categories are included by default.

semantics.label: Grading Settings
semantics.description: Information how the content should be graded
